error.signature: OOM command not allowed when used memory > 'maxmemory'

verdict.summary: Redis memory limit reached and eviction policy does not allow the operation.

dead_ends.why_fails: Without limits, Redis grows until the OS OOM killer terminates it, losing all data

dead_ends.action: Flush all data (FLUSHALL) to free memory
dead_ends.why_fails: Destroys all data. Only appropriate if data is a rebuildable cache.

workarounds.how: CONFIG SET maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru  # evict least-recently-used keys

workarounds.action: Increase maxmemory if the server has available RAM
Analyze memory usage to find large keys
workarounds.how: redis-cli --bigkeys  # finds largest keys per type; redis-cli MEMORY USAGE key_name
